uploadDescription: Choose one or more local GIF files to convert to animated PNG in your browser.
chooseFilesLabel: Drop GIFs here or click to upload
uploadHint: Files stay on this device. Conversion runs locally after you press the button.
optionsDescription: Resize frames, adjust playback speed, and decide how the APNG should loop.
scaleDescription: Resize every frame from 10% to 400% of the original GIF dimensions.
speedDescription: 1x keeps the source timing. Higher values play faster; lower values play slower.
loopDescription: Follow GIF reads the source loop count. If the GIF has no loop data, APNG uses one play.
resultDescription: Preview converted animations and download individual PNG files or a ZIP for batches.
emptyResultDescription: Upload GIF files and run conversion to see animated PNG outputs here.
noFilesError: Upload at least one GIF before converting.
invalidGifError: This file is not a valid GIF.
emptyGifError: The GIF does not contain any decodable frames.
invalidFrameError: A GIF frame could not be decoded safely.
canvasUnavailableError: This browser cannot use canvas to resize GIF frames.
conversionFailedError: GIF conversion failed. Try a smaller file or another GIF.
partialConversionError: Some GIFs could not be converted.
zipFailedError: The APNG files were created, but ZIP packaging failed. Download the files individually.
